questions.question: Create a table called Employee that contains a unique attribute EMPNO. What are the characteristics of EMPNO in a relational database?
questions.hint: A unique identifier, possibly an auto-incrementing integer

questions.question: An Employee table has an EMPNO attribute. How would you ensure data integrity in this attribute?
questions.hint: Use a UNIQUE constraint or PRIMARY KEY constraint

questions.question: Describe the data type of the EMPNO attribute in a relational database management system.
questions.hint: Typically an integer data type, such as INT or INTEGER
